Mastercard expands support to USDC, PYUSD, RLUSD stablecoin settlement
summary: The payments giant said USDC, PYUSD, RLUSD and other stablecoins will support new settlement options across multiple blockchains.

title: Trezor says Safe 7 chip flaw found by Ledger does not put funds at risk
summary: Trezor and Tropic Square disclosed a TROPIC01 chip vulnerability found during a Ledger Donjon audit, saying the Safe 7 wallet and user funds remain secure.

title: ‘Incredible Rally’ in Most Speculative Portions of Market, Says Cameron Dawson
summary: Cameron Dawson, CIO at NewEdge Wealth, discusses the level of froth in the equities rally, but says the earnings picture is “so very strong” that you can’t sit things out. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nestle Buys Out Yfood Founders in New CEO’s First Purchase
summary: Nestle SA is taking full control of ready-to-drink meal maker yfood Labs GmbH, bolstering the company’s push into faster-growing brands.

title: Democrats Sanders and Warren Push Labor Department to Abandon Bitcoin 401(k) Rule
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Democrats Sanders and Warren Push Labor Department to Abandon Bitcoin 401(k) Rule
Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren are urging the U.S. Department of Labor under Donald Trump to withdraw a proposed rule allowing Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies in retirement accounts.

title: George Santos Referred to DOJ, CFTC Over State of the Union Kalshi Trades: Report
summary: The pardoned ex-congressman allegedly bet against his own State of the Union appearance while publicly hyping it.

title: UK Regulator Warns Soccer Clubs Over Unauthorized Crypto Sponsorship Deals
summary: The FCA has warned Premier League clubs that partnerships with unlicensed crypto firms could expose fans to unregulated trading platforms.

title: Partners Group limits withdrawals in private equity fund for wealthy individuals
summary: Swiss private capital firm caps redemptions from its $8.6bn flagship vehicle

title: Cliffwater’s flagship private credit fund redemption requests hit 17%
summary: Fund with net assets of $31bn aimed at retail investors limits withdrawals in latest sign of exodus from sector
